hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】德意志银行：比特币近期跌破 60,000 美元表明美联储、ETF 和人工智能面临压力；【CRYPTO】策略：资本堆栈遇到比特币价格下跌；【AI】新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境。

items.title: Bitcoin's recent drop below $60,000 signals Fed, ETF and AI pressures: Deutsche Bank
items.summary: Bitcoin's slump to its lowest level since late 2024 reflects a hawkish Federal Reserve, exchange-traded fund outflows and a shift of capital into AI, the bank said.
items.title_zh: 德意志银行：比特币近期跌破 60,000 美元表明美联储、ETF 和人工智能面临压力
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，比特币跌至 2024 年底以来的最低水平，反映出美联储的强硬态度、交易所交易基金的流出以及资本转向人工智能。

items.title: Strategy: The Capital Stack Meets a Falling Bitcoin Price
items.summary: Below is a summarized version of The Block Research’s Strategy: The Capital Stack Meets a Falling Bitcoin Price report. The full PDF version of this report is accessible here. Strategy Inc., formerly MicroStrategy, faces the first real test of its Bitcoin-treasury model. It holds
items.title_zh: 策略：资本堆栈遇到比特币价格下跌
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Block Research 策略的摘要：资本堆栈遇到比特币价格下跌报告。可在此处获取该报告的完整 PDF 版本。 Strategy Inc.（前身为 MicroStrategy）面临着其比特币金库模式的首次真正考验。它持有

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: 'Regime change but in a velvet glove': How Kevin Warsh has set out to remake the Fed
items.summary: The first big announced changes point toward a quiet revolution, with task forces set up to rethink virtually everything done at the Fed.
items.title_zh: “政权更迭，但戴着丝绒手套”：凯文·沃什如何着手重塑美联储
items.summary_zh: 第一个宣布的重大变化预示着一场悄然的革命，成立了特别工作组来重新思考美联储所做的几乎所有事情。

items.title: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
items.summary: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.
items.title_zh: 当局称，以色列军队在战斗平息后在黎巴嫩南部打死两人
items.summary_zh: 以色列军方称这两人是真主党特工，但伊朗支持的组织指责其违反停火协议。

items.title: U.S. Warns of ‘Imminent’ Atrocities in El Obeid, Sudan
items.summary: A highway running through El Obeid links Darfur in west Sudan to the east, making it a strategically significant battleground.
items.title_zh: 美国警告苏丹奥贝德“迫在眉睫”的暴行
items.summary_zh: 一条穿过埃尔奥贝德的高速公路将苏丹西部的达尔富尔与东部连接起来，使其成为具有重要战略意义的战场。

items.title: ‘Quarter-end catalyst or consolidation?’: Bitcoin below $63,000 amid ETF outflows, $10.6 billion options expiry
items.summary: Bitcoin trades under $63,000 ahead of PCE data Thursday on, which analysts say is the market's next key test.
items.title_zh: “季末催化剂还是盘整？”：ETF 流出、106 亿美元期权到期，比特币跌破 63,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 在周四 PCE 数据公布之前，比特币交易价格低于 63,000 美元，分析师称这是市场的下一个关键考验。

items.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
items.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
items.title_zh: GPT-5 如何帮助免疫学家 Derya Unutmaz 解开 3 年前的谜团
items.summary_zh: GPT-5 Pro 帮助解决了一个长达 3 年的免疫学谜团，提供了对 T 细胞行为的见解。这一突破可以支持癌症和自身免疫研究。

items.title: MIT’s Initiative for New Manufacturing builds momentum
items.summary: In its first year, INM has worked across research, workforce development, and industry engagement to help accelerate new manufacturing technologies and their real-world deployment.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的新制造倡议蓄势待发
items.summary_zh: 在成立的第一年，INM 致力于研究、劳动力发展和行业参与，以帮助加速新制造技术及其在现实世界的部署。

items.title: When it comes to predicting people’s preferences, it pays to consider “the power of three”
items.summary: MIT researchers provide a major upgrade to the nearly century-old idea of random utility models.
items.title_zh: 在预测人们的偏好时，考虑“三者的力量”是值得的
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员对近百年历史的随机效用模型理念进行了重大升级。

items.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
items.summary: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
items.title_zh: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
items.summary_zh: 艾伦·格林斯潘 (Alan Greenspan) 在四位总统的领导下执掌美联储 19 年，并掌握了被称为 Fedspeak 的混淆艺术。

items.title: U.S. and Iran begin peace talks amid conflicting claims over Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Iran's military said it had closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to continued Israeli military strikes in Lebanon; the U.S. said it remains open.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡主权争议中开始和平谈判
items.summary_zh: 伊朗军方表示，已关闭霍尔木兹海峡，以回应以色列对黎巴嫩的持续军事打击；美国表示仍保持开放。

items.title: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
items.summary: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.
items.title_zh: 美伊达成协议后数十艘船只驶过霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 自美国和伊朗签署旨在结束战争的协议以来，该水道的交通量有所增加，仅周六就有 42 艘船只。

items.title: UN commission of inquiry says Israel committing genocide in Gaza by deliberately targeting children
items.summary: Israel rejects the new report by the three-member expert panel, calling it a "libellous sham".
items.title_zh: 联合国调查委员会称以色列故意针对儿童在加沙实施种族灭绝
items.summary_zh: 以色列拒绝接受三人专家小组的新报告，称其为“诽谤性的骗局”。

items.title: How Mark Rutte of NATO Manages an Unpredictable Trump
items.summary: Secretary General Mark Rutte is headed to Washington. His style has at times frustrated the very European leaders who need him to hold the alliance together.
items.title_zh: 北约的马克·鲁特如何应对不可预测的特朗普
items.summary_zh: 秘书长马克·吕特将前往华盛顿。他的风格有时会让那些需要他来维持联盟的欧洲领导人感到沮丧。

items.title: After Wars and False Starts, Cautious Optimism for U.S.-Iran Talks
items.summary: Tehran and Washington face myriad negotiating pitfalls. But both sides are exhausted and running out of options. They may finally need a deal.
items.title_zh: 战争和失败的开始之后，对美伊谈判持谨慎乐观态度
items.summary_zh: 德黑兰和华盛顿面临着无数的谈判陷阱。但双方都已精疲力竭，别无选择。他们可能最终需要达成协议。

items.summary: Fund issuers are exploring blockchain-based ETFs amid fears of missing an early foothold in tokenized finance.
items.title_zh: 纽约银行认为“FOMO”推动资产管理公司进入代币化基金
items.summary_zh: 由于担心错过代币化金融的早期立足点，基金发行人正在探索基于区块链的 ETF。

items.title: Chainlink teams up with 47 South Korean, European banks to speed up international money transfers
items.summary: The alliance, called Project Pangea, plans to use stablecoins to settle multimillion-dollar currency trades between Europe and South Korea in near real time.
items.title_zh: Chainlink 与 47 家韩国和欧洲银行合作，加快国际汇款速度
items.summary_zh: 该联盟名为 Project Pangea，计划使用稳定币近乎实时地结算欧洲和韩国之间数百万美元的货币交易。

items.title: New York man sentenced for $1.4 million crypto fraud scheme using bogus influencer accounts
items.summary: A New York man who posed as crypto influencers on Telegram and used false promises of staking rewards was sentenced to 15 months in prison.
items.title_zh: 纽约男子因使用虚假影响者账户进行 140 万美元的加密货币欺诈而被判刑
items.summary_zh: 一名纽约男子在 Telegram 上冒充加密货币影响者并使用虚假承诺进行质押奖励，被判处 15 个月监禁。

items.title: Tether-backed Oobit brings USDT to nearly 170 million users of Brazil’s PIX payment network
items.summary: Created by Banco Central do Brasil in 2020, PIX is one of the world's most widely-adopted digital payment networks.

items.summary_zh: PIX 由巴西中央银行于 2020 年创建，是世界上采用最广泛的数字支付网络之一。

items.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
items.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.
items.title_zh: Omio 如何打造对话式旅行的未来
items.summary_zh: 了解 Omio 如何使用 OpenAI 来增强对话式旅行体验、加速产品开发并转型为一家 AI 原生公司。

items.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
items.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.
items.title_zh: 使用人工智能帮助医生诊断影响儿童的罕见遗传病
items.summary_zh: 研究人员使用 OpenAI 推理模型来帮助诊断罕见疾病，在之前未解决的病例中识别出了 18 种新的诊断结果。

items.title_zh: 从 Hugging Face Hub 到 Strands Agents 和 LeRobot 的机器人硬件

items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Jinhua Zhao named head of the Department of Urban Studies and Planning
items.summary: An expert in behavioral science and transportation, Zhao combines these studies with AI and public policy to address some of the most urgent challenges facing cities.
items.title_zh: 赵金华出任城市研究与规划系主任
items.summary_zh: 作为行为科学和交通领域的专家，赵将这些研究与人工智能和公共政策相结合，以解决城市面临的一些最紧迫的挑战。

items.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
items.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 表示，比特币的未来将像智能手机一样具有革命性
items.summary_zh: CoinDesk 的指数和数据总裁向投资者传达了一条信息：不要指望比特币。

items.title: Spider which uses spring trap to capture prey discovered in Australia
items.summary: Researchers say their hunting method - which allows them to prey on dangerous ants - is unprecedented.
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚发现蜘蛛利用弹簧陷阱捕捉猎物
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表示，它们的狩猎方法——这使得它们能够捕食危险的蚂蚁——是前所未有的。

items.title: Mideast Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Offer Conflicting Accounts of Nuclear Discussions
items.summary: President Trump said Iran had agreed to the “highest level” inspections, hours after an Iranian official said there were “no detailed discussions on the nuclear issue,” as the two sides continued to present different narratives of their latest talks.
items.title_zh: 中东实时更新：美国和伊朗对核讨论的说法相互矛盾
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，伊朗已同意进行“最高级别”的检查，几小时前，一名伊朗官员表示“没有就核问题进行详细讨论”，双方继续对最新会谈提出不同的说法。

items.title: Vitalik Buterin says Ethereum Foundation will cut budget 40% in major reset
items.summary: The reduction comes on the same day the EF confirmed a 20% reduction in headcount and follows the resignation of co-Executive Director Hsiao-Wei Wang. Her departure brings the total number of senior Ethereum Foundation figures to leave since January to nine, underscoring the scal
items.title_zh: Vitalik Buterin 表示以太坊基金会将在重大调整中削减 40% 的预算
items.summary_zh: 此次裁员发生在 EF 确认员工人数减少 20% 的同一天，并且联合执行董事王小伟也辞职了。她的离开使得自 1 月份以来以太坊基金会高级官员的离职人数达到 9 人，凸显了以太坊基金会的规模。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation cuts 20% of staff amid leadership exodus
items.summary: The reduction follows a period of significant upheaval at the organization’s leadership level.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会因领导层流失而裁员 20%
items.summary_zh: 此次裁员是在该组织领导层经历一段时期的重大变动之后进行的。

items.title: Bitcoin may need to plunge 15% or more to mark bottom, according to this long-time indicator
items.summary: With bitcoin testing its 200 week moving average, on-chain data suggests the $50,000 to $54,000 range could become the next key battleground.
items.title_zh: 根据这一长期指标，比特币可能需要暴跌 15% 或更多才能触底
items.summary_zh: 随着比特币测试 200 周移动平均线，链上数据表明 50,000 美元至 54,000 美元的区间可能成为下一个关键战场。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation cuts 20% of its workforce as new 5-cluster structure takes shape
items.summary: Ethereum Foundation cut 20% of its workforce, reorganizing into five clusters as part of a long-simmering reorganization.
items.title_zh: 随着新的 5 集群结构的形成，以太坊基金会裁员 20%
items.summary_zh: 作为酝酿已久的重组的一部分，以太坊基金会裁员 20%，重组为五个集群。

items.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises

items.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

items.title: In game theory, generalists sometimes win out over specialists
items.summary: Researchers show that for certain kinds of games, an overlooked class of algorithms performs much better than expected.
items.title_zh: 在博弈论中，通才有时会战胜专家
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，对于某些类型的游戏，一类被忽视的算法的表现比预期要好得多。

items.title: Startup’s nuclear-inspired cooling system could make data centers more sustainable
items.summary: Founded by two researchers from MIT, Ferveret reduces the amount of energy and water required to cool the chips that power AI.
items.title_zh: 初创公司的核冷却系统可以使数据中心更具可持续性

items.title: Mamdani-backed candidates are likely to win in NYC primaries, prediction market traders expect
items.summary: Voters are heading to the polls in New York, with four competitive races in Democratic congressional primaries in focus.
items.title_zh: 预测市场交易员预计，马姆达尼支持的候选人可能会在纽约市初选中获胜
items.summary_zh: 选民们即将前往纽约投票，民主党国会初选的四场激烈角逐成为焦点。

items.title: SpaceX seeing some interest from short sellers, but many still afraid to bet against Musk
items.summary: About 40 million SpaceX shares are sold short, roughly 5% to 7% of the shares that are publicly available to trade, according to an estimate by S3 Partners.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 看到了卖空者的一些兴趣，但许多人仍然不敢做空马斯克
items.summary_zh: 据 S3 Partners 估计，约有 4000 万股 SpaceX 股票被卖空，约占公开交易股票的 5% 至 7%。

items.title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks are falling in response
items.summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."
items.title_zh: Meta 正在构建一个预测市场应用程序。这些股票纷纷下跌
items.summary_zh: 报道称，首席执行官马克·扎克伯格指示员工开发一个预测市场平台，内部称为“Arena”。

items.title: U.S. fights with Brazil for China's giant soybean market
items.summary: The U.S. Soybean Export Council makes claims to higher quality a selling point over Brazil's crop, as American farmers attempt to win back business from the world's largest importer
items.title_zh: 美国与巴西争夺中国巨大大豆市场
items.summary_zh: 美国大豆出口委员会声称更高质量是巴西作物的卖点，因为美国农民试图从世界最大进口国手中夺回业务

items.title: China's 618 shopping festival growth slows sharply as consumer spending malaise persists
items.summary: The latest consumer data reinforce how consumption in China remains subdued.
items.title_zh: 消费者支出持续低迷，中国618购物节增速大幅放缓
items.summary_zh: 最新的消费者数据凸显了中国的消费依然低迷。

items.title: Can anyone join Musk in the trillionaire club? Zuckerberg has best shot, according to prediction markets
items.summary: The Meta CEO is seen as next to join the Tesla and SpaceX CEO. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is seen as the second-most-likely.
items.title_zh: 有人能加入马斯克的万亿富翁俱乐部吗？根据预测市场，扎克伯格是最好的选择
items.summary_zh: Meta 首席执行官被认为是继特斯拉和 SpaceX 首席执行官之后的下一位首席执行官。英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋被认为是第二个最有可能的人。

items.title: Drowning deaths soar in France as Europe buckles in peak of heatwave
items.summary: Forty people have drowned in heatwave-related deaths in France since last Thursday, Prime Minister Sébastien Lecornu says.
items.title_zh: 欧洲遭遇热浪高峰，法国溺水死亡人数激增
items.summary_zh: 法国总理塞巴斯蒂安·勒科尔努表示，自上周四以来，法国已有 40 人因热浪而溺水身亡。

items.title: Zambia ex-president's family wins latest legal battle over what should happen to his body
items.summary: Edgar Lungu's family and the Zambian government remained in dispute 12 months after he died.
items.title_zh: 赞比亚前总统的家人在关于他的尸体应该如何处理的最新法律诉讼中获胜
items.summary_zh: 埃德加·伦古 (Edgar Lungu) 去世 12 个月后，他的家人与赞比亚政府仍存在争议。

items.title: US top court says Rastafarian man cannot sue prison guards who cut his dreadlocks
items.summary: The former Louisiana inmate argued his Rastafarian faith was violated after prison officials focibly shaved off his hair.
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院称拉斯塔法里男子不能起诉剪掉他辫子的狱警
items.summary_zh: 这位前路易斯安那州囚犯辩称，监狱官员强行剃掉他的头发后，他的拉斯特法里信仰受到侵犯。

items.title: Irish government to contribute £197m to cross-border rail services
items.summary: The money will come from the last allocation from the Irish government's Shared Island Fund.
items.title_zh: 爱尔兰政府将捐助1.97亿英镑用于跨境铁路服务
items.summary_zh: 这笔钱将来自爱尔兰政府共享岛屿基金的最后拨款。

items.title: Trump anticipates better relationship with Colombia under new leader
items.summary: Abelardo de la Espriella, who preliminary results suggest is Colombia's next president, had Trump's endorsement.
items.title_zh: 特朗普预计新领导人领导下与哥伦比亚关系会更好
items.summary_zh: 初步结果显示，阿韦拉多·德拉埃斯普里埃拉将成为哥伦比亚下一任总统，他得到了特朗普的支持。

items.title: Montreal shooting leaves officer, civilian and suspect dead
items.summary: It was the first time in 24 years that a Montreal police officer was killed in the line of duty, the city's police chief said.
items.title_zh: 蒙特利尔枪击事件造成警官、平民和嫌疑人死亡
items.summary_zh: 蒙特利尔市警察局长表示，这是 24 年来首次有一名警察在执行任务时被杀。

items.title: ‘A Terrible Inheritance’: Could Andy Burnham Succeed Where Starmer Failed?
items.summary: The likely successor to Prime Minister Keir Starmer will inherit the same challenges of economic stagnation and ascendant populism. Will a divided nation be prepared to give him time?
items.title_zh: “可怕的继承”：安迪·伯纳姆能否在斯塔默失败的地方取得成功？
items.summary_zh: 总理基尔·斯塔默的可能继任者将面临经济停滞和民粹主义抬头的同样挑战。一个分裂的国家愿意给他时间吗？

items.title: Iran Makes Moves to Assert Control Over the Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: After Iran weaponized the waterway by making it too dangerous for businesses, experts say, the country is now looking to charge fees to vessels seeking to transit the vital water.
items.title_zh: 伊朗采取行动控制霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 专家表示，伊朗将这条水道武器化，使其对企业来说过于危险，现在该国正寻求向寻求运输重要水源的船只收取费用。

items.title: Delcy Rodríguez, Venezuela’s President, Struggles to Uphold Trump’s Narrative of Success
items.summary: President Trump says Venezuela, under U.S. oversight, has “never made the money” it is making now. But new oil revenue isn’t helping ordinary Venezuelans, and anger seems to be mounting.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉总统德尔西·罗德里格斯努力维护特朗普的成功叙事
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统表示，在美国的监督下，委内瑞拉“从未赚到过现在赚到的钱”。但新的石油收入并没有帮助普通委内瑞拉人，人们的愤怒似乎正在加剧。

items.title: Britain Is Still Deep in the Shadow of Brexit
items.summary: Ten years after a slim majority voted to leave the European Union, the economic and political effects of that decision continue to disrupt the United Kingdom.
items.title_zh: 英国仍深陷脱欧阴影之中
items.summary_zh: 在以微弱多数投票决定离开欧盟十年后，这一决定的经济和政治影响继续扰乱着英国。

items.title: Those British Strawberries Are Being Picked by Central Asian Workers
items.summary: Ten years after Brexit, most seasonal workers in Britain are from countries such as Kyrgyzstan and Tajikistan. Without them, agricultural chiefs say, many farms would fail.
items.title_zh: 那些英国草莓正在被中亚工人采摘
items.summary_zh: 英国脱欧十年后，英国的大多数季节性工人来自吉尔吉斯斯坦和塔吉克斯坦等国家。农业负责人表示，如果没有它们，许多农场就会倒闭。

items.title: Soldier, Scholar and Symbol: Marc Bloch Is Elevated to France’s Panthéon
items.summary: French politicians, including those on the far right, are embracing a Jewish Resistance fighter murdered by the Gestapo in 1944.
items.title_zh: 士兵、学者和象征：马克·布洛赫 (Marc Bloch) 被晋升为法国先贤祠
items.summary_zh: 包括极右翼在内的法国政界人士正在拥抱 1944 年被盖世太保杀害的犹太抵抗运动战士。

items.title: Meta is developing a prediction market app called ‘Arena’ as sector booms: NYT
items.summary: The app would let users forecast future events using a points-based system rather than cash wagers, the report said, citing people familiar with the matter.
items.title_zh: 随着行业的繁荣，Meta 正在开发一款名为“Arena”的预测市场应用程序：《纽约时报》
items.summary_zh: 报道援引知情人士的话称，该应用程序将允许用户使用基于积分的系统而不是现金投注来预测未来事件。

items.title: The SEC delayed tokenizing stocks, and here’s why that’s a relief
items.summary: Before we rush to tokenize U.S. equities, we need compliance systems that understand context, not just checkboxes. Investors like Michael Burry see the danger, so should the rest of us, urges Chamarajnagar.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会推迟了股票代币化，这就是为什么这让人松了一口气
items.summary_zh: 在我们急于将美国股票代币化之前，我们需要能够理解上下文的合规系统，而不仅仅是复选框。 Chamarajnagar 敦促说，像迈克尔·伯里这样的投资者看到了这种危险，我们其他人也应该看到这种危险。

items.title: Former Robinhood Crypto COO Tanya Denisova joins stablecoin issuer Agora as head of operations
items.summary: The former Robinhood Crypto executive will oversee operations as Agora scales its rapidly growing AUSD stablecoin business.
items.title_zh: Robinhood Crypto 前首席运营官 Tanya Denisova 加入稳定币发行商 Agora，担任运营主管
items.summary_zh: 随着 Agora 扩大其快速增长的澳元稳定币业务，这位 Robinhood Crypto 前高管将负责监督运营。

items.title: In Clarity Act's final weeks, its path through U.S. Senate not getting much clearer
items.summary: Tough negotiations linger in several difficult arenas, but crypto's Washington lobbyists are flying in allies this week and still hoping for a July vote.
items.title_zh: 在《澄清法案》的最后几周，该法案在美国参议院的通过之路并没有变得更加清晰
items.summary_zh: 在几个困难的领域，艰难的谈判仍在继续，但加密货币的华盛顿游说者本周纷纷结成盟友，仍然希望在 7 月进行投票。

items.title: Nearly 100 Catholic leaders oppose Clarity Act over weakened safeguards against illicit finance and trafficking
items.summary: The Alliance to End Human Trafficking, which is supported by Catholic organizations, pushed back against the sweeping cryptocurrency bill.
items.title_zh: 近 100 名天主教领袖反对《澄清法案》，因为该法案削弱了打击非法金融和贩运的保障措施
items.summary_zh: 由天主教组织支持的终止人口贩运联盟反对全面的加密货币法案。

items.title: Meta’s Zuckerberg wants to build prediction market app like Polymarket and Kalshi: NYT
items.summary: Prediction markets have swelled into a multi-billion-dollar business with users from all around the world betting billions of dollars.
items.title_zh: Meta 的扎克伯格希望构建像 Polymarket 和 Kalshi 这样的预测市场应用程序：纽约时报
items.summary_zh: 预测市场已发展成为一项价值数十亿美元的业务，来自世界各地的用户投注了数十亿美元。

items.title: DOJ seizes Huione Group cloud computing account used to launder billions in fraud proceeds
items.summary: Last year, FinCEN designated Huione Group as a primary money laundering concern under the USA Patriot Act.
items.title_zh: 美国司法部查封汇旺集团用于洗钱数十亿美元欺诈收益的云计算账户
items.summary_zh: 去年，FinCEN 根据《美国爱国者法案》将汇旺集团指定为主要洗钱组织。

items.title: Goldfinch set to shutter Prime after community vote backs wind-down proposal
items.summary: The protocol facilitated roughly $100 million in loans, but a handful of borrower pools later encountered "serious performance issues."
items.title_zh: 社区投票支持逐步关闭提案后，Goldfinch 将关闭 Prime
items.summary_zh: 该协议促成了大约 1 亿美元的贷款，但少数借款人池后来遇到了“严重的绩效问题”。

items.title: OKX Europe chief says 80% of crypto exchanges won’t survive MiCA as deadline nears
items.summary: OKX Europe CEO Ghoos said 80% of exchanges won't survive MiCA as ESMA forces unlicensed firms to cease EU operations by July 1.
items.title_zh: OKX Europe 负责人表示，随着最后期限的临近，80% 的加密货币交易所将无法在 MiCA 中幸存
items.summary_zh: OKX Europe 首席执行官 Ghoos 表示，80% 的交易所将无法在 MiCA 中幸存，因为 ESMA 迫使无牌公司在 7 月 1 日之前停止欧盟业务。

items.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

items.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world

items.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work

items.summary_zh: 三星电子向全球员工部署 ChatGPT Enterprise 和 Codex，这标志着 OpenAI 最大的企业人工智能部署之一。
